infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: MindLink needs your location to find people with similar interests near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: MindLink works best with location access to continuously find nearby connections.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: MindLink needs camera access to update your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: MindLink needs photo library access to update your profile photo.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow MindLink to use your location to find nearby connections.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow MindLink to access your photos for profile pictures.
